items.name_en: Anjou Mini Limited Custom Heart Style — Black/Red Heart
items.name_cn:
Anjou Mini Limited Custom Heart Style — Black/Red Heart
Double-sided mini tote. The patterned side uses custom high-quality rain-silk consistent with ZP〽️, then coated with glossy shellac [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both glossy and matte🤟 The leather is top-grain calfskin👛 soft and flexible💪 Plus custom hand-painted designs, allowing for three styles in one bag. Includes bag charm and pouch🎀➕gift box🎁➕upgraded manual💌
Size: Top 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
🔎020660

items.name_en: Another hot BV Bottega Veneta lunch box bag for this year 🔥. The entire body is made of top-tier Nappa lambskin, very soft and lightweight. It also features the Intrecciato weaving technique, developed by the two founders over several months since the brand's inception. Completely hand-woven by Italian artisans, perfectly embodying Bottega's artisanal spirit. The bag shape is a practical and popular lunch box style, and the slightly curved opening fits the wrist better. Model: 754443, Dimensions: 22*13*9
items.name_cn: Another hot BV Bottega Veneta lunch box bag for this year 🔥. The entire body is made of top-tier Nappa lambskin, very soft and lightweight. It also features the Intrecciato weaving technique, developed by the two founders over several months since the brand's inception. Completely hand-woven by Italian artisans, perfectly embodying Bottega's artisanal spirit. The bag shape is a practical and popular lunch box style, and the slightly curved opening fits the wrist better. Model: 754443, Dimensions: 22*13*9

items.name_en: Another new arrival messenger bag💕Size 33💕11376(Creamy Green💕Glossy💕Light Brown) The Puzzle Bag is Jonathan Anderson's first handbag for LOEWE. The rectangular shape and precise cutting technique create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines. Now launching a spacious, soft Hobo bag made of soft Nappa leather and suede bottom cover.
items.name_cn:
Another new arrival messenger bag💕Size 33💕11376(Creamy Green💕Glossy💕Light Brown) The Puzzle Bag is Jonathan Anderson's first handbag for LOEWE. The rectangular shape and precise cutting technique create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines. Now launching a spacious, soft Hobo bag made of soft Nappa leather and suede bottom cover.
Shoulder or crossbody
One external zip pocket and one internal slip pocket
Leather zip pull
Herringbone cotton canvas lining
Anagram embossed (no box)
